Defines vibration patterns and parameters for the "Nudge Nudge" feature in Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
The JSON configuration file defines a sequence of vibration patterns for a device. It includes a list of `notes`, each with specific attributes such as `id`, `vibe_duration_ms`, `brake_duration_ms`, and `strength`, which determine the characteristics of each vibration. The `pattern` array specifies the order in which these notes are played. The `repeat_delay_ms` value sets the delay in milliseconds before the pattern repeats. The `comments` field provides a brief description or label for the configuration.
